spec_changes.highlight: IL validation during syncing: CL should only pass ILs when synced; during sync, follow heaviest weight
Proposed Payload Status V2 with 'latest IL-satisfied hash' field to align node views after sidechain reorgs
Open problem: syncing nodes lack IL history for unfinalized sidechains, making IL compliance checks unreliable for deep branches
Payload Status V2 may not be needed; spec changes forthcoming before DevNet Zero

client_updates.highlight: Nethermind passes all FOCIL tests; partial interop attempted but blocked by lack of stable devnet

testing_progress.highlight: FOCIL DevNet Zero will base off Glamsterdam devnet-5 once stabilized; devnet-4 considered insufficient scope
DevNet Zero requires at least 2 CLs and 2 ELs; ~3 CLs and 3-4 ELs currently implementing FOCIL
Kurtosis interop testing needed with a censoring/malicious builder before DevNet Zero; Besu error codes for IL-noncompliant payloads flagged as potentially unresolved

organizational.highlight: FOCIL coordination remains in the closed external Discord channel; may merge into ACDT when mature

action_items.action: Write up IL sidechain validation problem and share in Discord for EL/CL input
Update execution-apis PR with Payload Status V2 proposal once design is finalized

decisions.decision: FOCIL DevNet Zero will target Glamsterdam devnet-5 as base; move to devnet-6 if devnet-5 is unstable

targets.target: Spec changes for IL sidechain validation ready before FOCIL DevNet Zero (est. a few weeks)
Revisit DevNet Zero scope and builder readiness in ~2 weeks
